case_title: GESIMAR FREIRE VS. IMPERIAL MARBLE KITCHENS & BATHS, INC., A

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FREIRE, GESIMAR AS TO DEFENDANT IMPERIAL MARBLE KITCHENS & BATHS, INC., A CALIFRORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
